docket_entries.description: DECLARATION REGARDING STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT OF FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: THE COURT ORDERS THAT RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $6,525.00 US CURRENCY, PLUS INTEREST SINCE THE DATE OF DEPOSIT, IS HREBY DECLARED FORFEITED PUR TO THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11470 ET SEQ AS AGAINST ANY AND ALL INTERESTED PARTIES AND BE DISPOSED OF AS PROVIDED BY THE PROVISIONS OF HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11489 - SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
